{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165450DD49C15D4FA289BE882D"}"},"total":39},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7590484038625985304","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的是本很不错的书，尤其在番茄。不过也的确是一个比较理想化的故事，也很明显，没有刻意隐藏，都看得出来。但作者却把感情写得细腻，看得很舒服[OK]（妈的不懂怎么说）很是让我感慨就是了。也对于咏对父母的态度转变感到熟悉，但是他更加牛逼，毕竟理想化一些。不过看得很爽，很舒服。很喜欢这两个主角。看得我心里暖暖的","text_exts":[{"e":151,"s":149,"text":"暖暖","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9A%96%E6%9A%96&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399689089BE882D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227590484038625985304%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227433045028127116313%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9A%96%E6%9A%96%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767308261,"group_id":"7433045028127116313","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N042OE98QyTFjGgC5SawdG4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/05a570374f91485c8f747a35a521b47d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528066&x-signature=R8Ewa3MiJo7YkV4miYDtAql9Zs4%3D","user_id":"95433281112","user_name":"永恒艺术"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"95433281112","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7433045028127116313","book_info":{"abstract":"（双男主×学霸×学渣×双洁×校园×男作者）
不是哥们，一觉醒来互换身体了？
不是哥们，互换的方式还这么别致？
不是哥们……
怎么感觉有点香？
室友之间因为意外互换身体而导致的一系列搞笑轻松日常，也因为这一变故，原本都不太的合群的两人，慢慢影响，互相改变……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oaa3c8153f40679ca032cf317d34050d9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"荒非","author_id":"","book_id":"7433045028127116313","book_name":"不是哥们，互换身体了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0b880","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":831,"name":"灵魂互换","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=831&name=灵魂互换&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7433045162311287321","read_count":"221","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"313551"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"147","tags":"双男主,校园,学霸,双洁,现代,灵魂互换,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oaa3c8153f40679ca032cf317d34050d9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180890&x-signature=ccpwCwm3chuxT9DdvrcSzUOYRAs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2075484204576647","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"146"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165450DD49C15D4FA289BE882D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":26378,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":92},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7472585097100739353","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的好看啊！！！双向救赎，“你是从我烂泥里的生活中向我伸出的救赎” “你是在我按部就班像傀儡一样的生活中带我逃离原生家庭的救赎”（这是我自己想的理解，不对可以积极探讨）
可是遗憾的是我咏宝和前哥还没结婚呢
小赵和班长的爱情也没有继续篇，还不知道“包打听”有没有追到我们穆婷班长
咏宝的父母最后也没有表示，不过俩人最后身份也互换了，就证明前哥会去找咏宝父母“撒娇”的吧哈哈哈哈，也许在平行世界已经实现了，俩人也举行了婚礼
2025.2.18 12：00刚好看完祝平行世界的你们幸福携手共白头，小赵和班长也要在一起哦.","text_exts":[{"e":15,"s":11,"text":"双向救赎","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E6%95%91%E8%B5%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399689089BE882D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227472585097100739353%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227433045028127116313%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E6%95%91%E8%B5%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739851373,"group_id":"7433045028127116313","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/QuwtE0psZtT0z9OQ4Xf08=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/35a94588de75437a85b94999642ad82f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529960&x-signature=JgcBKiC78GkHxAgphBpcGrXQLH4%3D","user_id":"442464139230700","user_name":"祁奚落琂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"442464139230700","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7433045028127116313","book_info":{"abstract":"（双男主×学霸×学渣×双洁×校园×男作者）
